deliverables.title: Short-Form Landowner Testimonial (In-Person: Big Timber, Montana)
deliverables.description: I'll produce a short professionally edited talking-head style testimonial.

lineItems.details: 45-minute on-site landowner interview, 2 camera angles. This also includes time spent planning and expectation setting with interviewee.
Includes an extra hour for setup and teardown and the following lights: Aputure Nova, Aputure MC (x4), Amaran T4C, Amaran F22x + dBtx lavalier microphone packs.
Simple intro/outro title slides with Pheasants Forever logo and a lower thirds graphic with interviewee name.
Edited vertical version optimized for social media.
Find, license and add royalty free background music that's on brand.
Flat rate of $1.25 per mile covering gas, driving time, gear hauling, and vehicle depreciation.

deliverablesList: 90-240 second talking head style testimonial video

deliverables.title: Animated Landowner Testimonial + Static Visuals (Virtual: Opheim, Montana)
deliverables.description: I'll produce a short, professionally edited virtual testimonial featuring custom animations, with key visuals repurposed as standalone for reuse on web and print.

lineItems.details: 45-minute virtual landowner interview recording, editing, audio enhancement, masking and video cleanup.
Custom animations and B Roll to enhance and visually support key points and data shared in the testimonial.
Simple intro/outro title slides with Pheasants Forever logo and a lower thirds graphic with interviewee name.
Edited vertical version optimized for social media.
I'll reformat key imagery from the animations to be used as static artwork to be embedded on web and print materials.
Find, license and add royalty free background music that's on brand.
